name: Bully Hunter
overview: The internet can be a dark place, where evil lurks in the shadows, and abusers act with impunity; a team of virtual vigilantes, led by James McGibney, are taking back the initiative, helping the helpless, and making the web a safer place.

trailers.title: New Special "Bully Hunter" Premieres Tuesday, September 23 at 10pm ET/PT on A&E
